name: Longhorn Quick Chili Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the cottage cheese in a blender or food processor or with an electric mixer.
2. Blend in the chili mixture, mixing well.
3. Add the hot sauce, lemon juice, and cumin to the chili mixture.
4. Pour into a bowl and blend in most of the cheddar cheese, reserving some for garnish.
5. Cover and chill. Makes about 3 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Tortilla Chips, Celery, Cucumber, Bread Sticks, Deli Meats, Pickled Baby Corn, Carrots
